mncTables.Description: Plugin of inserting nanoCAD tables into the drawing according to GOST/DSTU/STB or from the specified file
mncTables.h12: Brief description (reference to the table in the normative document)
mncTables.h14: You can zoom the image using the mouse wheel, pan while holding down the left mouse button and fit the image by pressing the right mouse button
mncTables.h16: Inserting a table with Top-left binding
mncTables.h17: Inserting a table with Top-right binding
mncTables.h18: Inserting a table with Bottom-Left binding
mncTables.h19: Inserting a table with Bottom-right binding
mncTables.h31: Specify the path to the file
mncTables.msg1: Could not copy file to disk!\nThere may be no administrator rights
mncTables.msg3: In the "Tables from file" section, the file is incompatible with this version of nanoCAD!
